response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The first song 'M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!' lyrics in JSON were used as a structural guide, though the specific English version performed by the artist was transcribed manually for accuracy. The second song '炎夏' (Enka) was transcribed manually using the burnt-in lyrics as the primary ground truth. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for song identification and initial lyric structure; the transition and second song required manual transcription due to the reference JSON being incomplete for those sections. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal activations. Included prominent visual text for song titles and dialogue prompts. Applied instantaneous transitions (Rule 3) during rapid song sections to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Don't matter the pain, I'll try to be brave
subtitles.english: Don't matter the pain, I'll try to be brave

subtitles.original: As long as you can stay happy, I'm okay
subtitles.english: As long as you can stay happy, I'm okay

subtitles.original: I'm not gonna bend, I can be a cure for fixing your heart
subtitles.english: I'm not gonna bend, I can be a cure for fixing your heart

subtitles.original: And I'll play as a nurse, healing you every day
subtitles.english: And I'll play as a nurse, healing you every day

subtitles.original: Your smile is enough to heal all my aches
subtitles.english: Your smile is enough to heal all my aches

subtitles.original: If you're feeling pain, call my name, I'll be by your side
subtitles.english: If you're feeling pain, call my name, I'll be by your side

subtitles.original: Then I see you smile, bright and bright again
subtitles.english: Then I see you smile, bright and bright again
It was a form without salvation

subtitles.original: ただただ襲い来る 影ばかり見て
subtitles.english: Just staring at the shadows that keep attacking

subtitles.original: 揶揄う言葉 立ち上がれない夜風
subtitles.english: Teasing words, a night breeze that won't let me stand up

subtitles.original: 淡く光る場所へ 裸足で駆け出したら
subtitles.english: When I ran barefoot towards the dimly lit place

subtitles.original: ただ膝を抱えている 君がいたんだから
subtitles.english: Because you were there, just holding your knees

subtitles.original: 悲劇ぶった 天国へ
subtitles.english: To a heaven pretending to be a tragedy

subtitles.original: 不甲斐ない 瞳 ぎゅっと
あの日 みつめた 君のせいだ
subtitles.english: It's because of you who I stared at that day

subtitles.original: 淡い 淡い 水面の向こうへと
subtitles.english: Towards the other side of the faint, faint water surface

subtitles.original: 救いのない熱を持った
subtitles.english: I held a heat without salvation

subtitles.original: 憂いのない貴方の瞳は
逢瀬としてる その顔に
subtitles.english: At that face that acts like a meeting
I wanted to try touching it
To a heaven pretending to be a comedy
